stories.headline: Eversource CEO Joe Nolan: 'We are resisting data centers'
stories.summary: Eversource CEO Joe Nolan told analysts data centers are of 'no value to our residential customer — actually, any customer' and will only drive up energy prices, putting a major investor-owned utility on record against accommodating large-load growth.

stories.headline: Evergy projects up to 8% annual retail sales growth on data centers
stories.summary: Evergy told investors data center demand could push retail sales growth as high as 8% per year — the polar opposite of Eversource's stance and a preview of the regulatory fights coming for utilities racing to add hyperscaler load.

stories.headline: Sunrun Q1 sales drop sharply after solar tax credit expiration, tariffs
stories.summary: Sunrun reported a steep Q1 sales decline tied to the wind-down of the residential solar Investment Tax Credit and Trump-era tariffs on imported components — an early read on how the post-IRA solar market is contracting.

stories.headline: PA PUC's large-load tariff for data centers heads to revised final order
stories.summary: A PUC spokesperson said a revised final order on the Model Large Load Tariff — covering customers above 50 MW individually or 100 MW in aggregate, with termination fees and universal-service contributions — will issue 'in the coming days,' Chairman Stephen DeFrank said.

stories.headline: 363,324 PA mail ballots returned ahead of May 19 primary
stories.summary: Pennsylvania Department of State data through 8 a.m. Friday show 363,324 mail ballots returned — 43.24% of the 840,222 applications approved — nine days out from the May 19 primary that includes six competitive U.S. House races.

stories.headline: Alabama files emergency SCOTUS appeal after court blocks new GOP primary maps
stories.summary: An Alabama court Friday night denied the GOP's request to greenlight new mid-decade primary elections under freshly drawn maps; the state filed an emergency appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court, the latest front in the White House-driven redistricting push.

stories.headline: AOC declines to rule out 2028 presidential or Schumer Senate challenge
stories.summary: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, asked Friday at the University of Chicago Institute of Politics about a 2028 White House bid or primarying Sen. Chuck Schumer, said 'my ambition is way bigger' than any title and could be pursued from 'the House… the Senate… the White House.'

stories.headline: Pirates pound Giants 13-3 behind 20-hit barrage; Ashcraft tosses 7 strong
stories.summary: Braxton Ashcraft (2-2) went 7 IP, 6 H, 1 ER, 6 K at Oracle Park as Brandon Lowe drove in four (including a 2-run triple) and Nick Gonzales went 4-for-6 in Pittsburgh's season-high 20-hit night; Pirates climb to 22-18.

stories.headline: Steelers wrap rookie minicamp; McCarthy holds Saturday media availability
stories.summary: Pittsburgh's three-day rookie minicamp ran May 8-10 — first on-field work for the 2026 draft class — with Mike McCarthy speaking after Saturday's practice; the team also signed third-round OT Gennings Dunker. OTAs begin May 18.

stories.headline: Riverhounds top Louisville City 2-0 on the road
stories.summary: Trevor Amann scored inside the opening 10 minutes and Sam Bassett added one from outside the box early in the second half as keeper Nico Campuzano made seven saves for the shutout in front of nearly 10,000 at Lynn Family Stadium.

market_data.as_of: May 8 close / PJM RT 8:11 a.m. EPT
